case_title: TANG, HUI VS HARRIS, TIM et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,342.00 FILED BY TANG, HUI AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, TIM V-C EGG COMPANY INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO TIM HARRIS.
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO STEVEN HERRERA, AGT FOR V-C EGG CO.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, HUI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, TIM V-C EGG COMPANY INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC-108 REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT & ANSWER FILED BY PLTFF;COPIES MAILED TO ALL PARTIES;TO: FOLDER/DIANNE'S DESK.
COPIES OF SC-108A, SC-108, NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDG MENT, JUDGMENT AND SMALL CLAIMS WERE SENT TO PRO- TEM DAVID LAVINE FOR REVIEW AND SIGNATURE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TANG, HUI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HARRIS, TIM V-C EGG COMPANY INC. NO RECOVERY TO PLAINITFF BEYOND THAT WHICH INSURANCE COMPANY HAD ALREADY AGREED TO PAY. ORDER IS TO REFLECT THE APPORTIONMENT OF LOSS ARRIVED AT BY THE INSURANCE COMPANY: 60% TO PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AMENDED JUDGMENT FILED AND MAILED TO ALL PARTIES. "NO RECOVERY BEYOND WHAT WAS AGREED TO PAY BY THE INSU CO. W/C IS 60% OF THE LOSS IN FAVOR OF PLTF."
